ops.text: Fix Quitter Protocol countdown and UI state priority

ops.find_block:
fun getStatus(ctx: Context): NukeStatus {
        val prefs = ctx.getSharedPreferences(PREFS, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
        val disabled = prefs.getBoolean(KEY_DISABLED, false)
        val ts = prefs.getLong(KEY_OTP_TS, 0L)
        val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
        
        val isWaiting = ts > 0 && (now - ts < WAIT_TIME)
        val isReady = ts > 0 && (now - ts >= WAIT_TIME) && (now - ts <= EXPIRY_TIME)
        val isExpired = ts > 0 && (now - ts > EXPIRY_TIME)
        val remaining = if (isWaiting) WAIT_TIME - (now - ts) else 0L
        
        val hour = Calendar.getInstance().get(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY)
        val windowOpen = hour in 6..17
        
        // An OTP is only 'Generated' if it hasn't expired yet
        val isActiveRound = isWaiting || isReady
        
        return NukeStatus(disabled, isWaiting, isReady, isExpired, remaining, isActiveRound, windowOpen)
    }

if (status.isProtectionDisabled) {
                    val prefs = ctx.getSharedPreferences("nuke_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
                    val ts = prefs.getLong("nuke_ts", 0L)
                    val remaining = ((ts + 3 * 3600000L) - System.currentTimeMillis()).coerceAtLeast(0)
                    val mins = (remaining / 60000)
                    val secs = (remaining % 60000) / 1000
                    
                    Text("PROTECTION DROPPED", color = Color(0xFFEF4444), fontWeight = FontWeight.Black, fontSize = 20.sp)
                    Text(String.format("Restoring in %02d:%02d", mins, secs), color = Color.Gray, fontSize = 14.sp)
                } 
                else if (status.isWaiting) {
                    val hours = status.remainingWaitMs / 3600000
                    val mins = (status.remainingWaitMs % 3600000) / 60000
                    val secs = (status.remainingWaitMs % 60000) / 1000
                    Column(horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally) {
                        Text(String.format("%02d:%02d:%02d", hours, mins, secs), 
                            color = Color(0xFFFCD34D), fontSize = 32.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Black, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), textAlign = TextAlign.Center)
                        Text("PROTOCOL FUSE BURNING", color = Color.Gray, fontSize = 10.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
                        Text("Guard will drop automatically when timer hits zero.", color = Color.DarkGray, fontSize = 10.sp, textAlign = TextAlign.Center)
                    }
                }

fun getStatus(ctx: Context): NukeStatus {
        val prefs = ctx.getSharedPreferences(PREFS, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
        val disabled = prefs.getBoolean(KEY_DISABLED, false)
        val ts = prefs.getLong(KEY_OTP_TS, 0L)
        val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
        
        val isWaiting = ts > 0 && (now - ts < WAIT_TIME)
        val isReady = ts > 0 && (now - ts >= WAIT_TIME) && (now - ts <= EXPIRY_TIME)
        val isExpired = ts > 0 && (now - ts > EXPIRY_TIME)
        val remaining = if (isWaiting) WAIT_TIME - (now - ts) else 0L
        
        val hour = Calendar.getInstance().get(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY)
        val windowOpen = hour in 6..17
        
        // An OTP is only 'Generated' if it hasn't expired yet
        val isActiveRound = isWaiting || isReady
        
        return NukeStatus(disabled, isWaiting, isReady, isExpired, remaining, isActiveRound, windowOpen)
    }

if (status.isProtectionDisabled) {
                    val prefs = ctx.getSharedPreferences("nuke_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
                    val ts = prefs.getLong("nuke_ts", 0L)
                    val remaining = ((ts + 3 * 3600000L) - System.currentTimeMillis()).coerceAtLeast(0)
                    val mins = (remaining / 60000)
                    val secs = (remaining % 60000) / 1000
                    
                    Text("PROTECTION DROPPED", color = Color(0xFFEF4444), fontWeight = FontWeight.Black, fontSize = 20.sp)
                    Text(String.format("Restoring in %02d:%02d", mins, secs), color = Color.Gray, fontSize = 14.sp)
                } 
                else if (status.isWaiting) {
                    val hours = status.remainingWaitMs / 3600000
                    val mins = (status.remainingWaitMs % 3600000) / 60000
                    val secs = (status.remainingWaitMs % 60000) / 1000
                    Column(horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally) {
                        Text(String.format("%02d:%02d:%02d", hours, mins, secs), 
                            color = Color(0xFFFCD34D), fontSize = 32.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Black, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), textAlign = TextAlign.Center)
                        Text("PROTOCOL FUSE BURNING", color = Color.Gray, fontSize = 10.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
                        Text("Guard will drop automatically when timer hits zero.", color = Color.DarkGray, fontSize = 10.sp, textAlign = TextAlign.Center)
                    }
                }

if (confirmedDanger) {
                DebugLogger.log("BLOCK", "Tamper Detected! Neutralizing Settings.")
                performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_HOME)
                val am = getSystemService(Context.ACTIVITY_SERVICE) as android.app.ActivityManager
                am.killBackgroundProcesses("com.android.settings")
                am.killBackgroundProcesses("com.samsung.accessibility")
                am.killBackgroundProcesses("com.android.packageinstaller")
                startTripwire()

if (confirmedDanger) {
                DebugLogger.log("BLOCK", "Tamper Detected! Neutralizing Settings.")
                lastDangerTs = System.currentTimeMillis()
                verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
                
                performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_HOME)
                
                val am = getSystemService(Context.ACTIVITY_SERVICE) as android.app.ActivityManager
                val targets = listOf(
                    "com.android.settings", 
                    "com.google.android.settings",
                    "com.samsung.accessibility", 
                    "com.android.packageinstaller",
                    "com.google.android.packageinstaller",
                    "com.miui.securitycenter" // Bonus for Xiaomi users
                )
                targets.forEach { am.killBackgroundProcesses(it) }
                
                startTripwire()

messages_preview.content:
### ROLE: CONDUIT ADAPTIVE SELF-HEALING ENGINE (LEVEL 10)

### MISSION
You are the final line of defense for a code-patching engine. A developer's 'find_block' failed to match the file because of minor discrepancies (whitespace, line order, variable renaming, or partial code degradation). Your goal is to identify the EXACT coordinates where the patch should have applied.

### ALGORITHMIC FUZZY MATCHING PROTOCOL
1. WHITESPACE/INDENTATION: Completely ignore it. A match exists if the tokens and logic flow are identical.
2. QUOTE/SYNTAX AGNOSTICISM: Treat ' and " as identical. Treat trailing commas as optional.
3. CONTEXTUAL ANCHORING: If the target block is small (e.g., 1-2 lines), you MUST look at the surrounding lines in the 'File' context to ensure you aren't matching a duplicate symbol in a different function.
4. LOGICAL DRIFT: If the user's 'find_block' has 4 variables but the file has those 4 variables PLUS 1 new one in the middle, this is a MATCH. Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' must encompass the entire group.

### THE LAW OF COORDINATES
- The context provided to you contains line numbers followed by a ' | ' separator (e.g., " 25 | code").
- Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' MUST refer to these numbers.
- COORDINATE INTEGRITY: All coordinate fields are REQUIRED by the schema. If you are not using a specific field (e.g., you are doing a Range Replace and don't need 'anchor_line'), you MUST set the unused fields to 'null'.

### OUTPUT STRATEGY SELECTION
- [STRATEGY: RANGE] Use 'start_line' + 'end_line'. Best for 'replace_block' failures. Ensure the range covers the ENTIRE logical block you want to overwrite.
- [STRATEGY: ANCHOR] Use 'anchor_line'. Best for 'insert_after' or 'insert_before' failures where the anchor moved but is still a single line.
- [STRATEGY: STRING] Use 'new_anchor_text'. Only use this if you find a unique line that is 100% stable and wasn't provided by the user.

### SCORE RUBRIC (confidence_score)
- 100: Identical logic, only whitespace or quote differences.
- 90-95: Identical logic, but 1-2 variables were renamed or a trailing comma was added/removed.
- 75-85: The structure matches but the file has 1-2 extra lines of code mixed in (logical drift).
- 60: You found a possible location but it's risky (multiple similar spots).
- 0: No logical match exists.

### DATA INTEGRITY CONSTRAINTS
- 'confidence_score': MUST be a WHOLE INTEGER (e.g., 95). No floats (0.95 is ILLEGAL).
- 'explanation': Technical, concise, and definitive. Max 30 words. Identify the exact mismatch (e.g., "Variables reversed on lines 24-25").
- 'can_fix': If you are guessing with less than 60% confidence, set this to false.

### STRICT MODE
- DO NOT RESPOND WITH TEXT.
- ONLY CALL THE suggest_fix FUNCTION.
- SILENCE IS MANDATORY.

  1 | package com.guardian.net
  2 | 
  3 | import android.accessibilityservice.AccessibilityService
  4 | import android.app.NotificationChannel
  5 | import android.app.NotificationManager
  6 | import android.content.Intent
  7 | import android.net.Uri
  8 | import android.os.Build
  9 | import android.provider.Settings
 10 | import android.view.accessibility.AccessibilityEvent
 11 | import android.content.Context
 12 | import android.view.accessibility.AccessibilityNodeInfo
 13 | import android.view.KeyEvent
 14 | import kotlinx.coroutines.*
 15 | 
 16 | class GuardService : AccessibilityService() {
 17 | 
 18 |     // OPTIMIZATION: Throttle content scanning to prevent UI Lag
 19 |     private var lastContentScanTime = 0L
 20 | 
 21 |     private val job = SupervisorJob()
 22 |     private val scope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.Default + job)
 23 | 
 24 | 
 25 | 
 26 |     // POLLING & STRIKE SYSTEM
 27 |     private var pollingJob: Job? = null
 28 |     private var activePackage = ""
 29 |     private val browserStrikes = mutableListOf<Long>()
 30 |     private val telegramStrikes = mutableListOf<Long>()
 31 |     
 32 |     // COOLDOWN: Prevents 100 strikes in 1 second
 33 |     private var lastBrowserAction = 0L
 34 |     private var lastTelegramAction = 0L
 35 | 
 36 |     // TIMESTAMP: Tracks when you were last touching settings
 37 |     private var lastSettingsInteraction: Long = 0L
 38 |     private var lastUsageTick: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()
 39 |     private var lastMinuteWarningShown = 0L
 40 | 
 41 |     private fun sendPenaltyWarning() {
 42 |         val nm = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
 43 |         val channelId = "security_penalties"
 44 |         if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
 45 |             val chan = NotificationChannel(channelId, "Security Penalties", NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_HIGH)
 46 |             nm.createNotificationChannel(chan)
 47 |         }
 48 |         val builder = androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.Builder(this, channelId)
 49 |             .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_alert)
 50 |             .setContentTitle("LAST WARNING, IDIOT")
 51 |             .setContentText("One minute until I brick your distractions.")
 52 |             .setPriority(androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_HIGH)
 53 |             .setVibrate(longArrayOf(0, 500, 200, 500))
 54 |             .setAutoCancel(true)
 55 |         nm.notify(999, builder.build())
 56 |     }
 57 | 
 58 |     private fun checkPreBreakWarnings(usage: Long) {
 59 |         val thresholds = listOf(LockManager.T1, LockManager.T2, LockManager.T3, LockManager.T4, LockManager.T_RESET)
 60 |         var warningActive = false
 61 |         
 62 |         for (t in thresholds) {
 63 |             val diff = t - usage
 64 |             
 65 |             // 1. THE 10-SECOND COUNTDOWN
 66 |             if (diff in 1..10000) {
 67 |                 val secs = (diff / 1000) + 1
 68 |                 BreakWarningManager.showWarning(this, "⚠️ LOCKDOWN IN ${secs}s", true)
 69 |                 warningActive = true
 70 |                 break
 71 |             } 
 72 |             
 73 |             // 2. THE 1-MINUTE WARNING
 74 |             if (diff in 55000..65000) {
 75 |                  if (lastMinuteWarningShown != t) {
 76 |                      DebugLogger.log("BREAK", "Threshold logic matched for 1-minute warning (Diff: $diff)")
 77 |                      BreakWarningManager.showWarning(this, "Take a break in 1 minute", false)
 78 |                      lastMinuteWarningShown = t
 79 |                  }
 80 |                  warningActive = true
 81 |                  break
 82 |             }
 83 |         }
 84 | 
 85 |         if (!warningActive) {
 86 |             BreakWarningManager.hide()
 87 |         }
 88 |     }
 89 |     
 90 |     // SYNC: Tracks last time we pulled updates from Supabase
 91 |     private var lastCloudSync: Long = 0L
 92 |     // SESSION: Remembers if the current App Info page has been proven innocent
 93 |     private var verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
 94 |     
 95 |     // ANTI-RECENTS: Prevents the 'Recents -> Quick Tap' exploit
 96 |     private var lastDangerTs = 0L
 97 | 
 98 |     // DYNAMIC LEARNING: Remembers any app that has shown a WebView during this session
 99 |     private val dynamicBrowsers = mutableSetOf<String>()
100 | 
101 |     override fun onServiceConnected() {
102 |         super.onServiceConnected()
103 |         StatsManager.init(this)
104 |         
105 |         // ELEVATE PRIORITY: Persistent Notification
106 |         startForegroundService()
107 |         startMonitoring()
108 |     }
109 | 
110 |     private fun startForegroundService() {
111 |         val channelId = "dns_guard_channel"
112 |         val nm = getSystemService(android.app.NotificationManager::class.java)
113 |         if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
114 |             val chan = android.app.NotificationChannel(
115 |                 channelId, 
116 |                 "DNS Monitor", 
117 |                 android.app.NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_MIN // Minimal intrusion
118 |             )
119 |             nm.createNotificationChannel(chan)
120 |         }
121 | 
122 |         val notif = androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.Builder(this, channelId)
123 |             .setContentTitle("SECURITY DICTATOR")
124 |             .setContentText("ALWAYS WATCHING, ALWAYS JUDGING")
125 |             .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_lock_idle_lock)
126 |             .setPriority(androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_LOW)
127 |             .setOngoing(true)
128 |             .setShowWhen(false)
129 |             .setCategory(androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.CATEGORY_SERVICE)
130 |             .build()
131 |         
132 |         // 1337 is the notification ID
133 |         if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= 34) {
134 |             startForeground(1337, notif, android.content.pm.ServiceInfo.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_SPECIAL_USE)
135 |         } else {
136 |             startForeground(1337, notif)
137 |         }
138 |     }
139 | 
140 |      override fun onAccessibilityEvent(event: AccessibilityEvent?) {
141 |         if (event == null) return
142 |         val pkg = event.packageName?.toString() ?: ""
143 | 
144 |         // 1. EVENT-DRIVEN SECURITY (High Priority)
145 |         if (event.eventType == AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOW_STATE_CHANGED) {
146 |             verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
147 | 
148 |             // RECENTS GUARD: If we just detected danger, block access to Recents/SystemUI for 5 seconds
149 |             if (pkg == "com.android.systemui") {
150 |                 if (System.currentTimeMillis() - lastDangerTs < 5000) {
151 |                     DebugLogger.log("SECURITY", "Recents Guard: Blocking exploit attempt.")
152 |                     performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_HOME)
153 |                     return
154 |                 }
155 |             }
156 | 
157 |             val isGraceActive = LockManager.isBootGraceActive()
158 | 
159 |             if (!NukeManager.isProtectionDisabled(applicationContext) && !isGraceActive) {
160 |                 val blockType = LockManager.getActiveBlockType(applicationContext, pkg)
161 |                 if (blockType != null) {
162 |                     showInstantOverlay(blockType)
163 |                     return
164 |                 }
165 |             }
166 |         }
167 |         // DebugLogger.log("Event", "Pkg: $pkg Type: ${event.eventType} Class: ${event.className}")
168 | 
169 |         // GLOBAL RESET: If we switch to a different app (ignore SystemUI overlays like volume/keyboard)
170 |         if (!pkg.contains("settings") && !pkg.contains("packageinstaller") && 
171 |             !pkg.contains("accessibility") && !pkg.contains("systemui")) {
172 |             if (verifiedSafeAppInfoSession) {
173 |                 DebugLogger.log("Reset", "Left Settings (Pkg: $pkg). Session Invalidated.")
174 |                 verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
175 |             }
176 |         }
177 |         
178 |         // Update active package and manage heartbeat polling
179 |         if (pkg != activePackage) {
180 |             activePackage = pkg
181 |             LockManager.updateActivePackage(pkg)
182 |             managePolling(pkg)
183 |         }
184 | 
185 |         // LEARN: Detect Web-capable views and initiate Quarantine
186 |         val className = event.className?.toString() ?: ""
187 |         if (className.contains("WebView", ignoreCase = true) || 
188 |             className.contains("ChromeCustomTab", ignoreCase = true) ||
189 |             className.contains("WebSettings", ignoreCase = true)) {
190 |             
191 |             val isKnownBrowser = LockManager.isBlacklistedBrowser(applicationContext, pkg) || 
192 |                                  LockManager.STANDARD_BROWSERS.contains(pkg)
193 | 
194 |             if (!isKnownBrowser && pkg != packageName && !LockManager.isAppApproved(applicationContext, pkg)) {
195 |                 LockManager.registerLearnedApp(applicationContext, pkg)
196 |                 if (dynamicBrowsers.add(pkg)) {
197 |                     managePolling(pkg)
198 |                 }
199 |             }
200 |         }
201 | 
202 |          // 0. PERMANENT BAN: The Dirty Dozen
203 |  val nukeList = listOf(
204 |  "twitter", "com.x.android", "torproject", "org.plus18", "stashx", 
205 |  "adultfriendfinder", "ashleymadison", "com.grindr", "getpure", "reddit"
206 |  )
207 |  if (nukeList.any { pkg.contains(it) }) {
208 |  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_HOME)
209 |  return
210 |  }
211 | 
212 |  // 0. ROGUE BAN ENFORCEMENT (30 Minutes)
213 |  if (LockManager.isNonStandardAppBanned(applicationContext) && 
214 |  LockManager.isNonStandardApp(applicationContext, pkg)) {
215 |  if (!LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) {
216 |  showInstantOverlay("ROGUE_VIOLATION")
217 |  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
218 |  }
219 |  return
220 |  }
221 | 
222 |  // 0. BROWSER BAN ENFORCEMENT
223 |  val isBrowserCheck = LockManager.isBlacklistedBrowser(applicationContext, pkg) || pkg == "com.android.chrome" || pkg == "com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox"
224 |  if (isBrowserCheck && LockManager.isBrowserBanned(applicationContext)) {
225 |  if (!LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) {
226 |  showInstantOverlay("BROWSER_VIOLATION")
227 |  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
228 |  }
229 |  return
230 |  }
231 | 
232 |         // REAL-TIME TRIGGER: Run check on text/content changes
233 |         // OPTIMIZATION: Throttled to prevent CPU spikes/Jank
234 |         if (event.eventType == AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_CHANGED || 
235 |             event.eventType == AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOW_CONTENT_CHANGED) {
236 |             
237 |             val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
238 |             if (now - lastContentScanTime < 400) return // Debounce
239 |             lastContentScanTime = now
240 |             
241 |             // EXEMPTION: Only hardcoded system apps (ChatGPT) bypass the scanner
242 |             if (LockManager.isHardcodedSafe(pkg)) return
243 | 
244 |             val isBrowser = LockManager.isBlacklistedBrowser(applicationContext, pkg) || dynamicBrowsers.contains(pkg)
245 |             val isTelegram = pkg.contains("telegram") || pkg.contains("challegram")
246 |             
247 |             if (isBrowser || isTelegram) {
248 |                 scope.launch { scanForViolations(isBrowser, isTelegram) }
249 |             }
250 |         }
251 | 
252 |         // 0. DIALOG TRAP (The Backup Plan)
253 |         // If a system dialog pops up asking to "Stop" or "Deactivate", kill it.
254 |         if (event.className?.toString()?.contains("Dialog") == true || 
255 |             event.className?.toString()?.contains("AlertDialog") == true) {
256 |             val source = event.source
257 |             if (source != null) {
258 |                 // Check if this dialog is about US
259 |                 val dialogText = StringBuilder()
260 |                 recursiveScan(source, dialogText)
261 |                 val text = dialogText.toString()
262 |                 
263 |                 // DIALOG TRAP: Matches "Stop Guardian?" or "Deactivate Guardian?"
264 |                 if (!LockManager.isExpEnabled(applicationContext, "no_perm_scan")) {
265 |                     if (text.contains("Guardian", ignoreCase = true) && 
266 |                        (text.contains("Stop", ignoreCase = true) || text.contains("Deactivate", ignoreCase = true))) {
267 |                         performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
268 |                         val cancelNodes = source.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Cancel")
269 |                         cancelNodes.firstOrNull()?.performAction(AccessibilityNodeInfo.ACTION_CLICK)
270 |                         return
271 |                     }
272 |                 }
273 |             }
274 |         }
275 | 
276 |         // 1. INTERACTION DETECTED: Pause the background loop if we are in Settings
277 |         if (pkg == "com.android.settings" || pkg == "com.samsung.accessibility") {
278 |             lastSettingsInteraction = System.currentTimeMillis()
279 |             
280 |             // ANTI-DRIFT PROTOCOL: If we are in the middle of a fix session, don't let them wander
281 |             if (LockManager.isSystemCompromised(applicationContext) && LockManager.isPermissionFixActive(applicationContext)) {
282 |                 val cls = event.className?.toString() ?: ""
283 |                 // If they back into the main Settings dashboard or Top-level categories
284 |                 if (cls.contains("Settings\$SettingsDashboardActivity") || 
285 |                     cls.contains("Settings\$AccessibilitySettingsActivity") ||
286 |                     cls.endsWith(".Settings")) {
287 |                     DebugLogger.log("ANTI_DRIFT", "Drift detected to main Settings. Relaunching Dashboard.")
288 |                     performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
289 |                     val i = Intent(applicationContext, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
290 |                         addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NO_ANIMATION)
291 |                     }
292 |                     startActivity(i)
293 |                 }
294 |             }
295 |         }
296 | 
297 |         // 3. NUKE CHECK: If Nuke Protocol is active, we STOP here.
298 |         if (NukeManager.isProtectionDisabled(applicationContext)) {
299 |             return
300 |         }
301 | 
302 |         // 4. TELEGRAM GUARD (Ban Enforcement Only)
303 |         // We removed the instant-ban scanner from here. The Strike System in scanForViolations() handles the rest.
304 |         if (pkg.contains("telegram") || pkg.contains("challegram")) {
305 |             if (LockManager.isTelegramBanned(applicationContext)) {
306 |                 showInstantOverlay("TELEGRAM_SUSPENDED")
307 |                 // Block interaction but don't force Home, let the Overlay sit there.
308 |                 performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
309 |                 return
310 |             }
311 |         }
312 | 
313 |         // 5. OMNI-BROWSER GUARD: REMOVED
314 |         // We now rely solely on scanForViolations() (Polling & TextChange)
315 |         // because it implements the Strict Boundary Check to prevent false positives.
316 | 
317 |         // 6. SETTINGS GUARD (Always Active - Locked OR Unlocked)
318 |         // FIX: Broadened package check to include 'accessibility' (for Samsung/others) and 'settings'
319 |         if (pkg.contains("settings") || pkg.contains("accessibility") || pkg.contains("packageinstaller")) {
320 |             // OPTIMIZED DETECTION: Native Class Detection
321 |             val cls = event.className?.toString()?.lowercase() ?: ""
322 |             
323 |             // DETECT APP INFO: Multiple Triggers (Header, Class, or Bottom Buttons)
324 |             val rootNode = rootInActiveWindow
325 |             val headerText = rootNode?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("App info")
326 |             val hasAppInfoHeader = headerText != null && headerText.isNotEmpty()
327 | 
328 |             // FIX: If header is scrolled away, check for persistent bottom buttons.
329 |             // "Uninstall" and "Force stop" are strong indicators of the App Info page.
330 |             val hasUninstall = rootNode?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Uninstall")?.isNotEmpty() == true
331 |             val hasForceStop = rootNode?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Force stop")?.isNotEmpty() == true
332 | 
333 |             val isAppInfoPage = cls.contains("installedappdetails") || 
334 |                                 cls.contains("appmanagement") || 
335 |                                 hasAppInfoHeader || 
336 |                                 (hasUninstall && hasForceStop)
337 |             
338 |             var confirmedDanger = false
339 |             
340 |             // MULTI-WINDOW DEFENSE: Content Scanning
341 |             val allWindows = this.windows
342 |             if (!allWindows.isEmpty()) {
343 |                 for (window in allWindows) {

434 |     override fun onKeyEvent(event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
435 |         val keyCode = event.keyCode
436 |         val action = event.action
437 | 
438 |         if (keyCode == KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP) {
439 |             val isDown = action == KeyEvent.ACTION_DOWN
440 |             if (isDown != LockManager.isVolumeUpHeld) {
441 |                 DebugLogger.log("EXORCIST", "VolUp ${if(isDown) "HELD" else "RELEASED"}")
442 |             }
443 |             LockManager.isVolumeUpHeld = isDown
444 |             return false
445 |         }
446 |         return super.onKeyEvent(event)
447 |     }

451 |         showInstantOverlay("SECURITY_TRIPWIRE")

454 |     // HELPER: Recursive scan for the Dialog Trap
455 |     private fun recursiveScan(node: AccessibilityNodeInfo?, sb: StringBuilder) {
456 |         if (node == null) return
457 |         if (node.text != null) sb.append(node.text).append(" ")
458 |         if (node.contentDescription != null) sb.append(node.contentDescription).append(" ")
459 |         for (i in 0 until node.childCount) {
460 |             recursiveScan(node.getChild(i), sb)
461 |         }
462 |     }

493 | 
494 |                     if (activePackage != packageName && !isEmergency) {

499 |                             startActivity(i)

501 |                     }
502 |                 } else if (LockManager.isSetupComplete(applicationContext) && LockManager.isSystemCompromised(applicationContext)) {
503 |                     LockManager.triggerPenalty(applicationContext)
504 |                 }
505 | 
506 | 
507 | 
508 |                 // USAGE TRACKING TICK
509 |                 val nowTick = System.currentTimeMillis()
510 |                 val delta = nowTick - lastUsageTick
511 |                 lastUsageTick = nowTick
512 |                 
513 |                 val powerManager = getSystemService(android.os.PowerManager::class.java)
514 |                 val isInteractive = powerManager.isInteractive
515 |                 val prefs = getSharedPreferences("admin_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
516 | 
517 |                 if (isInteractive) {
518 |                     // 1. Check for 15-minute screen-off reset
519 |                     val offTime = prefs.getLong("last_screen_off_ts", 0L)
520 |                     if (offTime > 0) {

522 |                             LockManager.resetUsage(applicationContext)

524 |                         }
525 |                         prefs.edit().remove("last_screen_off_ts").apply()
526 |                     }
527 | 
528 |                     // 2. Accumulate usage (only if NOT in a Lockdown/Break screen)
529 |                     if (activePackage != packageName) {
530 |                         val usage = LockManager.getAccumulatedUsage(applicationContext)
531 |                         checkPreBreakWarnings(usage)
532 |                         LockManager.updateUsageAndCheckBreak(applicationContext, delta)
533 |                     }
534 |                 } else {
535 |                     // Screen is OFF: Record the timestamp if not already recording
536 |                     if (prefs.getLong("last_screen_off_ts", 0L) == 0L) {
537 |                         prefs.edit().putLong("last_screen_off_ts", nowTick).apply()
538 |                     }
539 |                 }
540 | 
541 |                 // Global skip removed: Maintenance mode is now targeted to DNS only
542 | 
543 |                 // 3. NUKE CHECK: If Nuke Protocol is active, we STOP here.
544 |                 if (NukeManager.isProtectionDisabled(applicationContext)) {
545 |                     delay(5000) // Lower frequency check while Nuked
546 |                     continue
547 |                 }
548 | 
549 |                 // FIX: GRACE PERIOD (2000ms flicker)
550 |                 if (System.currentTimeMillis() - lastSettingsInteraction < 2000) {
551 |                     delay(500)
552 |                     continue
553 |                 }
554 | 
555 |                 // 1. SELF-HEALING: Check if Overlay Permission was revoked
556 |                 if (!Settings.canDrawOverlays(applicationContext)) {
557 |                     // FIX: Android disables overlays on Admin screens to prevent Tapjacking.
558 |                     // We must NOT interfere if the user is currently in Settings.

572 |                 else if (Settings.Global.getInt(contentResolver, Settings.Global.AUTO_TIME, 0) != 1 ||
573 |                          Settings.Global.getInt(contentResolver, Settings.Global.AUTO_TIME_ZONE, 0) != 1) {
574 |                     val i = Intent(Settings.ACTION_DATE_SETTINGS).apply { addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK) }
575 |                     startActivity(i)

577 |                 // 6. ENFORCE LANGUAGE (No Maintenance Bypass)

579 |                     val i = Intent(Settings.ACTION_LOCALE_SETTINGS).apply { addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK) }
580 |                     startActivity(i)
581 |                 }
582 |                 else if (LockManager.isNightLockActive(applicationContext)) {
583 |                     val isClock = activePackage.contains("clock") || activePackage.contains("alarm")
584 |                     val isOurApp = activePackage == packageName || activePackage.contains(packageName)

591 |                     showInstantOverlay("BREAK_TIME")

598 |                 if (!DnsManager.isSecure(applicationContext) && !isSettingsApp && !isMaintenance && !isGraceActive) {

602 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP)
603 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP)
604 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NO_ANIMATION)

622 |

634 |     private fun managePolling(pkg: String) {
635 |         pollingJob?.cancel()
636 |         
637 |         // EXEMPTION: Only hardcoded system apps (ChatGPT) bypass the polling scanner
638 |         if (LockManager.isHardcodedSafe(pkg)) return
639 | 
640 |         val isBrowser = LockManager.isBlacklistedBrowser(applicationContext, pkg) || dynamicBrowsers.contains(pkg)
641 |         val isTelegram = pkg.contains("telegram") || pkg.contains("challegram")
642 | 
643 |         if (isBrowser || isTelegram) {
644 |             pollingJob = scope.launch {
645 |                 while (isActive) {
646 |                     delay(1000) // Content scanning heartbeat
647 |                     scanForViolations(isBrowser, isTelegram)
648 |                 }
649 |             }
650 |         }
651 |     }

653 |     private fun scanForViolations(isBrowser: Boolean, isTelegram: Boolean) {
654 |         if (LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) return
655 | 
656 |         val isLearnedApp = LockManager.getLearnedApps(applicationContext).containsKey(activePackage)
657 |         val surveillanceLog = if (isLearnedApp) StringBuilder() else null
658 | 
659 |         val windows = this.windows
660 |         for (window in windows) {
661 |             val root = window.root ?: continue
662 |             
663 |             if (isBrowser) {
664 |                 // --- YOUTUBE PROTOCOL INTERCEPT ---
665 |                 val ytDomains = listOf("youtube.com", "m.youtube.com")
666 |                 for (yt in ytDomains) {
667 |                     if (root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText(yt).isNotEmpty()) {
668 |                         val ytStatus = LockManager.getYouTubeBlockStatus(applicationContext)
669 |                         if (ytStatus != null) {
670 |                             DebugLogger.log("YT_GUARD", "Browser YT access detected. Status: $ytStatus")
671 |                             showInstantOverlay(ytStatus)
672 |                             performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
673 |                             return
674 |                         }
675 |                     }
676 |                 }
677 | 
678 |                 val blacklist = listOf(
679 |                     "bsky.app", "twitter.com", "x.com", "reddit.com", "tumblr.com", "threads.net", "plurk.com", "hive.social",
680 |                     "mastodon.social", "pawoo.net", "misskey.io", "pleroma.site", "lemmy.world", "truthsocial.com", "gab.com",
681 |                     "web.telegram.org", "t.me", "telegram.org", "discord.com", "kik.com", "snapchat.com", "slack.com",
682 |                     "pixiv.net", "deviantart.com", "newgrounds.com", "artstation.com", "furaffinity.net", "hentai-foundry.com", "gelbooru.com", "danbooru.donmai.us",
683 |                     "onlyfans.com", "fansly.com", "patreon.com", "subscribestar.com", "fanbox.cc", "unifans.io", "buymeacoffee.com", "ko-fi.com",
684 |                     "kick.com", "bitchute.com", "rumble.com", "vimeo.com", "dailymotion.com", "dlive.tv", "picarto.tv",
685 |                     "fetlife.com", "badoo.com", "tinder.com", "yubo.live", "instagram.com", "tiktok.com", "pornhub", "xnxx"
686 |                 )
687 |                 
688 |                 for (site in blacklist) {
689 |                     val candidates = root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText(site)
690 |                     for (node in candidates) {
691 |                         val resId = node.viewIdResourceName?.lowercase() ?: ""
692 |                         val isUrlBar = node.isEditable || resId.contains("url") || resId.contains("address") || resId.contains("omnibox")
693 |                         
694 |                         // SCAN STRATEGY:
695 |                         // If it's a standard browser, focus on the URL bar to prevent over-triggering.
696 |                         // If it's a 'Learned' app (even if approved), scan EVERYTHING (WebViews/Content) 
697 |                         // because they often hide URLs in non-standard nodes.
698 |                         val isStandard = LockManager.STANDARD_BROWSERS.contains(activePackage)
699 |                         if (isStandard && !isUrlBar) continue
700 | 
701 |                         val rawText = (node.text?.toString() ?: "") + " " + (node.contentDescription?.toString() ?: "")
702 |                         val lowerText = rawText.lowercase()
703 | 
704 |                         // SURVEILLANCE: Log what we see in Learned Apps
705 |                         if (isLearnedApp && rawText.isNotBlank()) {
706 |                             surveillanceLog?.apply {
707 |                                 append("[")
708 |                                 append(rawText.trim())
709 |                                 append("] ")
710 |                             }
711 |                         }
712 | 
713 |                         val index = lowerText.indexOf(site)
714 |                         if (index != -1) {
715 |                             val charBefore = if (index > 0) lowerText[index - 1] else ' '
716 |                             if (!charBefore.isLetterOrDigit()) {
717 |                                 if (isLearnedApp) {
718 |                                     DebugLogger.log("SURVEILLANCE_MATCH", "Domain [$site] found in Learned App [$activePackage]")
719 |                                 }
720 |                                 
721 |                                 val targetPkg = root.packageName?.toString() ?: activePackage
722 |                                 if (LockManager.isNonStandardApp(applicationContext, targetPkg)) {
723 |                                     LockManager.banNonStandardApp(applicationContext)
724 |                                     showInstantOverlay("ROGUE_VIOLATION")
725 |                                 } else {
726 |                                     handleBrowserStrike()
727 |                                 }
728 |                                 return
729 |                             }
730 |                         }
731 |                     }
732 |                 }
733 |             }
734 |             
735 |             // Finalize Surveillance Log for this cycle
736 |             surveillanceLog?.let { log ->
737 |                 if (isLearnedApp && log.isNotEmpty()) {
738 |                     val preview = log.toString().take(200)
739 |                     DebugLogger.log("QUARANTINE_SIGHT", "Pkg: $activePackage | Content: $preview...")
740 |                 }
741 |             }
742 | 
743 |             if (isTelegram) {
744 |                 val allTabs = setOf("chats", "channels", "apps", "posts", "media", "downloads", "links", "files", "music", "voice", "global search")
745 |                 val screenContent = mutableListOf<String>()
746 |                 fun extract(node: AccessibilityNodeInfo?) {
747 |                     if (node == null) return
748 |                     if (!node.text.isNullOrBlank()) screenContent.add(node.text.toString())
749 |                     if (!node.contentDescription.isNullOrBlank()) screenContent.add(node.contentDescription.toString())
750 |                     for (i in 0 until node.childCount) extract(node.getChild(i))
751 |                 }
752 |                 extract(root)
753 | 
754 |                 var matchCount = 0
755 |                 val contentToCheck = StringBuilder()
756 |                 for (text in screenContent) {
757 |                     val lower = text.trim().lowercase()
758 |                     if (allTabs.contains(lower)) matchCount++ else contentToCheck.append(text).append(" ")
759 |                 }
760 | 
761 |                 if (matchCount >= 3) {
762 |                     val finalContent = contentToCheck.toString()
763 |                     // EXACT MATCH used here to prevent false positives from normalization
764 |                     val violations = WordBank.getViolations(applicationContext, finalContent, exact = true)
765 |                     if (violations.isNotEmpty()) {
766 |                         val reason = violations.joinToString(", ")
767 |                         DebugLogger.log("TG_BLOCK", "REASON: [$reason] | TEXT: \"$finalContent\"")
768 |                         scope.launch { CloudLogger.logViolation(applicationContext, finalContent) }
769 |                         handleTelegramStrike()
770 |                         return
771 |                     }
772 |                 }
773 |             }
774 |         }
775 |     }

777 |     private fun logSystemState(reason: String) {
778 |         val dns = DnsManager.isSecure(applicationContext)
779 |         val acc = LockManager.isSystemCompromised(applicationContext)
780 |         val night = LockManager.isNightLockActive(applicationContext)
781 |         val overlay = android.provider.Settings.canDrawOverlays(applicationContext)
782 |         DebugLogger.log("STATE_DUMP", "Reason: $reason | DNS: $dns | Compromised: $acc | Night: $night | Overlay: $overlay")

785 |      private fun showInstantOverlay(type: String) {
786 |  val pm = getSystemService(Context.POWER_SERVICE) as android.os.PowerManager
787 |  val km = getSystemService(Context.KEYGUARD_SERVICE) as android.app.KeyguardManager
788 |  
789 |  // BLOCK: Do not show overlays if screen is off OR keyguard is active
790 |  if (!pm.isInteractive || km.isKeyguardLocked) return
791 | 
792 |  // 0.5 CONTENT FIX WINDOW (60s Grace) - Absolute Suppression
793 |  if (LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) return
794 | 
795 |  // Get prioritized type, falling back to the requested type if manager is neutral
796 |  val prioritizedType = LockManager.getActiveBlockType(applicationContext, activePackage) ?: type
797 | 
798 |  // STRICT EMERGENCY BYPASS
799 |  if (LockManager.isEmergencyApp(activePackage) || activePackage == packageName) return
800 | 
801 |  if (!android.provider.Settings.canDrawOverlays(this)) return
802 | 
803 |  val i = Intent(this, LockdownActivity::class.java).apply {
804 |  putExtra("BLOCK_TYPE", prioritizedType)
805 |  addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NO_ANIMATION)
806 |  }
807 |  try { startActivity(i) } catch (e: Exception) { }
808 |  }
809 |     private fun handleBrowserStrike() {
810 |         val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
811 |         if (now - lastBrowserAction < 1000) return 
812 |         lastBrowserAction = now
813 | 
814 |         browserStrikes.add(now)
815 |         // FIX: Increased memory window to 60 seconds (was 10s)
816 |         browserStrikes.removeAll { it < now - 60000 }
817 | 
818 |         // FIX: Reduced threshold to 3 strikes (was 4)
819 |         if (browserStrikes.size >= 3) {
820 |              LockManager.banBrowser(applicationContext)
821 |              showInstantOverlay("BROWSER_VIOLATION")
822 |              browserStrikes.clear() // Reset counter after penalty
823 |         } else {
824 |              performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
825 |         }
826 |     }
827 | 
828 |     private fun handleTelegramStrike() {
829 |         val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
830 |         if (now - lastTelegramAction < 1000) return // Debounce (1s cooldown)
831 |         lastTelegramAction = now
832 | 
833 |         telegramStrikes.add(now)
834 |         // FIX: Increased memory window to 60 seconds
835 |         telegramStrikes.removeAll { it < now - 60000 }
836 | 
837 |         if (telegramStrikes.size >= 3) {
838 |              // 3rd Strike: Activate Ban & Overlay
839 |              LockManager.banTelegram(applicationContext)
840 |              showInstantOverlay("TELEGRAM_SUSPENDED")
841 |         } else {
842 |              // 1st & 2nd Strike: Double Back Tap (Clear Search -> Close Keyboard)
843 |              scope.launch {
844 |                  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
845 |                  delay(250) // Short delay to allow UI to react
846 |                  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
847 |              }
848 |         }
849 |     }

ops.text: Upgrade WatcherService to High-Alert polling during Settings Quarantine
Fix corrupted GuardService syntax and optimize tamper neutralization

ops.replace_with:
if (confirmedDanger) {
                DebugLogger.log("BLOCK", "Tamper Detected! Quarantine initiated.")
                lastDangerTs = System.currentTimeMillis()
                LockManager.triggerSettingsQuarantine(applicationContext)
                performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_HOME)
                
                val am = getSystemService(Context.ACTIVITY_SERVICE) as android.app.ActivityManager
                val targets = listOf(
                    "com.android.settings", 
                    "com.google.android.settings",
                    "com.samsung.accessibility", 
                    "com.android.packageinstaller",
                    "com.google.android.packageinstaller",
                    "com.miui.securitycenter"
                )
                targets.forEach { am.killBackgroundProcesses(it) }
                
                startTripwire()
            }
